102:4: ثُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَم<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ُو</tajweed>نَ
102:5: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْيَق<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed>نِ
102:7: ثُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َ لَتَرَوُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َهَا عَيْنَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْيَق<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed>نِ
102:8: ثُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َ لَتُسْــَٔلُ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed><tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َع<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed>مِ
